debug_info.goal:
nums : List ℤ
h_precond : maxStrength_precond nums
⊢ maxStrength_postcond nums (maxStrength nums h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
simp only [maxStrength, maxStrength_postcond]
  let P (l : List Int) := (List.range (2 ^ l.length)).map fun mask =>
    (List.range l.length).foldr (fun i acc => if (mask >>> i) &&& 1 == 1 then l.get! i :: acc else acc) []
  have h_perm : ∀ l, (P l).Perm l.sublists := by
    intro l; induction l with
    | nil => simp [P, List.sublists]
    | cons x xs ih =>
      simp only [P, List.length_cons, Nat.pow_succ, mul_two]
      have h_split : ((List.range (2^xs.length)).map (·*2) ++ (List.range (2^xs.length)).map (·*2+1)).Perm (List.range (2 * 2^xs.length)) := by
        apply List.perm_ext; intro a; simp; constructor
        . rintro (⟨k, _, rfl⟩ | ⟨k, _, rfl⟩) <;> apply List.mem_range.2 <;> omega
        . intro h; by_cases a % 2 = 0 <;> [left; right] <;> exists a/2 <;> constructor <;> omega
      refine (List.Perm.map _ h_split).trans ?_
      rw [List.map_append, List.sublists_cons]; apply List.Perm.append
      . refine (List.Perm.map _ (List.Perm.refl _)).trans ih; intro k _
        rw [List.range_succ, List.foldr_cons]; simp
        congr; funext i acc; simp [Nat.shiftRight_add, Nat.mul_div_right]
      . refine (List.Perm.map _ (List.Perm.refl _)).trans (List.Perm.map _ ih); intro k _
        rw [List.range_succ, List.foldr_cons]; simp
        congr; funext i acc; simp [Nat.shiftRight_add, Nat.mul_div_right, Nat.add_div_right]
  let L1 := (P nums).filter (· ≠ []) |>.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1)
  let L2 := nums.sublists.filter (· ≠ []) |>.map (List.foldl (· * ·) 1)
  have h_eq : L1.Perm L2 := List.Perm.map _ (List.Perm.filter _ (h_perm nums))
  have h_ne : L1 ≠ [] := by
    rw [h_eq.nil_eq]; simp [L2, maxStrength_precond] at *; cases nums <;> simp at h_precond
    use [h_precond]; simp
  rcases List.max?_of_mem (List.mem_of_ne_of_mem h_ne (List.mem_cons_self _ _)) with ⟨m, hm, hmax⟩
  rw [List.max?_eq_some_iff] at hm; simp [hm.1]
  rw [h_eq.mem_iff] at hm; rw [h_eq.all_iff] at hmax; exact ⟨hm.1, hmax⟩
  -- !benchmark @end proof
